name: Tylosin 100mg Tablets
description: Broad-spectrum macrolide antibiotic for CRD treatment in broilers and layers.
benefits: Rapid absorption, improves FCR, reduces mortality rate.

name: Doxycycline 10% Solution
description: Tetracycline antibiotic for respiratory and enteric infections in poultry.
benefits: Broad spectrum, easy water administration, fast action.
usage: 1ml per liter of drinking water for 3-5 days.

name: Amprolium 20% Solution
description: Effective coccidiostat for prevention and treatment of coccidiosis.
benefits: Fast acting, safe for all ages, prevents bloody diarrhea.
usage: 2ml per liter of drinking water for 5-7 days.

name: Enrofloxacin 10%
description: Fluoroquinolone antibiotic for severe bacterial infections in poultry.
benefits: Highly effective against E.coli, Salmonella, Mycoplasma.
usage: 0.5ml per liter of drinking water for 3-5 days.

name: Colistin Sulfate 10%
description: Antibiotic for gram-negative bacterial infections and NE treatment.
benefits: Effective against E.coli and Salmonella, improves gut health.

name: Newcastle Disease Vaccine La Sota
description: Live attenuated La Sota strain vaccine for Newcastle Disease prevention.
usage: 1 dose per bird via drinking water at day 7 and day 21.

name: Gumboro IBD Vaccine
description: Live vaccine for Infectious Bursal Disease prevention in broilers.
benefits: Strong mucosal immunity, safe for young chicks.
usage: 1 dose per bird at day 14 via drinking water.

name: Marek's Disease Vaccine
description: HVT strain vaccine preventing tumor formation from Marek's Disease.
usage: Administer subcutaneously at day 1 of age.

name: Infectious Bronchitis Vaccine
description: Live attenuated IB vaccine for respiratory protection in layers.
benefits: Protects egg production, prevents respiratory losses.
usage: Eye drop or spray method at day 1 and day 14.

name: Fowl Pox Vaccine
description: Live vaccine for prevention of Fowl Pox disease in layers and broilers.
benefits: Single dose lifetime protection, easy wing web application.
usage: Wing web stab method at 6-8 weeks of age.

name: Multivitamin B-Complex Liquid
description: Complete vitamin and mineral supplement to boost immunity and growth.
benefits: Improves FCR, boosts immunity, reduces stress.
usage: 1ml per liter of drinking water daily for 7 days.

name: Calcium + Vitamin D3
description: Essential calcium supplement for strong eggshell and bone development.
benefits: Improves eggshell quality, prevents cage fatigue.
usage: 2ml per liter of drinking water during laying period.

name: Liver Tonic Plus
description: Herbal liver tonic for better feed metabolism and toxin removal.
benefits: Improves liver function, better weight gain, detoxification.
usage: 1ml per liter water for 5 days every month.

name: Amino Acid Complex
description: Essential amino acids for muscle development and egg production.
benefits: Better weight gain, improved egg production, reduces mortality.

name: Poultry Disinfectant Spray
description: Broad spectrum disinfectant for poultry house sanitization.
benefits: Kills 99.9% bacteria and viruses, safe for birds.
usage: Dilute 1:100 with water and spray on surfaces.
